data.title: Salesforce to pay $0.416 per share quarterly dividend on Oct 9, 2025, for shareholders recorded by Sep 17, 2025.
data.description: In San Francisco, Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), the top AI CRM globally, has disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.416 per share. The dividend will be distributed on October 9, 2025, to shareholders listed on September 17, 2025. Salesforce aids businesses of all scales in reimagining their operations with AI. Agentforce, the initial digital labor tool for corporations, effortlessly links with Customer 360 applications, Data Cloud, and Ein.

data.title: Gala Games upgrades referral program from 2 to 5 levels, allowing users to earn more rewards with larger networks.
data.description: Gala Games has enhanced their referral system, now offering users the opportunity to earn rewards through five friend levels instead of the previous two. This change allows users to increase their earnings as they expand their network.

data.title: Trump hurries trade deals while US firms abroad remain uncertain.
data.description: President Donald Trump is working quickly to complete new trade deals before the month's end. Meanwhile, American companies that operate overseas are still seeking clarity on current agreements.
Dollar holds firm with bonds steady ahead of jobs report.

data.title: First-time homebuyers need to be demure and mindful in various aspects such as finances, living situation, and buyer offers. By Jessica Lautz.
data.description: First-time homebuyers must approach the real estate market with a combination of modesty and careful consideration. It is crucial for them to exhibit modesty in various aspects such as managing finances, assessing their previous living arrangements, making buyer offers, and collaborating effectively with a real estate agent. This approach is essential for ensuring a successful and stress-free home buying experience.

data.title: Sherrod Brown faces challenges from crypto campaign cash in his Senate re-election bid in Ohio.
data.description: The Senate comeback bid of former Banking Chair Sherrod Brown in Ohio is facing challenges due to significant crypto campaign contributions.
Smithfield Foods increases secondary offering price for common stock.

data.title: Nasdaq and S&P 500 hit records, with Nasdaq leading up moderately; Nvidia recovers, Pure Storage sees breakaway gap.
data.description: Today, the Nasdaq experienced a moderate increase, leading in upside, while the S&P 500 reached a historic peak. Nvidia was able to reduce its losses in a bullish manner, and Pure Storage made a notable breakaway gap. Lumentum saw a substantial increase, contributing to the positive trend. The stock market's current performance is detailed in live coverage by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Wisetack partners with Group 1001 Insurance for new capital agreement, enhances home services financing.
data.description: In San Francisco, Wisetack, a prominent platform offering pay-over-time solutions for in-person services, revealed a fresh capital partnership with Group 1001. The collaboration entails Group 1001 acquiring home services and improvement loans generated via Wisetack technology and affiliated merchants and SaaS collaborators. This move secures substantial capital backing for Wisetack, empowering them to extend borrower-friendly rates and enhance their service offerings.

data.title: Enghouse Systems reports Q3 revenue of $125.6M, net income $17.2M; Adjusted EBITDA $32.3M; Cash reserve of $271.6M. Dividend of $0.30/share.
data.description: Enghouse Systems Limited reported third-quarter financial results for the period ended July 31, 2025. Revenue was $125.6 million, down from $130.5 million in Q3 2024, and for the nine-month period, it was $374.4 million compared to $376.8 million last year. Recurring revenue was $87.8 million, representing 69.9% of total revenue. Net income was $17.2 million in Q3 2025 compared to $20.6 million in Q3 2024. Adjusted EBITDA was $32.3 million in Q3 2025, with cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments totaling $271.6 million as of July 31, 2025. Enghouse took strategic cost-cutting measures and reported a net income of $17.2 million after special charges of approximately $3.0 million. The company plans to focus on completing accretive acquisitions and maintaining profitability in the future. The Board of Directors also approved a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per common share.

data.title: Global Dental Hygiene Devices Market to reach USD 7.24 billion by 2032, growing at a CAGR of 5.7% from 2025, driven by rising prevalence of dental diseases and adoption of advanced devices. North America dominates with 38.3% forecasted share in 2025. High costs may limit growth.
data.description: The global Dental Hygiene Devices Market is currently valued at USD 4.91 billion in 2025, with an expected growth to USD 7.24 billion by 2032, at a CAGR of 5.7%. Factors driving this growth include the rise in dental disorders, increased awareness of oral health, adoption of advanced devices like electric toothbrushes and water flossers, and technological innovations like smart connected devices. Aging populations, higher disposable incomes, government initiatives, dental tourism, and home-use devices availability also help fuel market growth. Electric toothbrushes are expected to remain the best-selling product type, accounting for 54.3% of the revenue share by 2025. The consumer (home use) segment is set to hold 35.4% market share, with online distribution channels dominating at 56.2% by 2025. North America is forecasted to lead the market, while Asia Pacific is anticipated to become a lucrative market for dental hygiene device manufacturers. The global rise in dental diseases, notably affecting around 3.5 billion people, is a significant factor propelling market demand for dental hygiene products. Despite the positive outlook, the high costs of advanced dental hygiene devices might hinder market growth to some extent, particularly impacting lower-income populations in developed and developing nations. Consumers' increasing awareness of oral hygiene benefits from public health campaigns and government initiatives is expected to unlock further growth avenues in the market.
